summary: Desktop responsive audit for Vajra prototype (viewport 1920x800) + mobile regression (390x844). 13 requested scenarios exercised end-to-end against the deployed preview. All 13 pass. Full create->lock->share flow works on desktop: amount 42.5 updates live in [data-testid=create-desktop-preview], memo row appears after typing on step 2, Connect wallet opens as a CENTERED dialog (bounding-box center x=960 on a 1920 viewport, not a bottom sheet), lock-authenticate is correctly disabled with a setup-passkey nudge until /passkey-setup runs the ceremony, and after lock the preview flips to 'SIGNED REQUEST' + 'LOCKED · VAJRA TOUCH' with a Vajra Code and Share request button that navigates to /share/[newly-created-id]. Share screen: QR card left, Copy (label becomes 'Copied'), Revoke opens a centered dialog (center x=960), confirming revoke shows the revoked ErrorCard at a narrower width. Pay VJ-CAFE42: verified banner + PAYING FROM wallet card render in the right column; Connect wallet -> Pay -> /progress/[id] -> wallet-confirm-sheet centered (center x=960) -> Approve -> progress-final-seal + progress-view-receipt navigates to /receipt/[id]. Receipt VJ-PAID88 ticket is ~512px wide, receipt-copy-link and receipt-share are on the SAME row (y1==y2==847). All error scenarios render the expected right-column card: pay-broken-card (VJ-TAMPRD), pay-expired-card (VJ-EXP7D1), pay-revoked-card (VJ-RVK9K2), pay-already-paid-card (VJ-PAID88), pay-wrong-network-card (VJ-NETETH after Connect), pay-wrong-wallet-card (VJ-PAYER3 after Connect - requires ~3.5s post-connect for phase='ready' evaluation). Security page shows reduce-motion, reduce-transparency and outage toggles; never-asks sheet centered (x=960). Open-link: pasting 'vajra.link/r/VJ-CAFE42' navigates to /pay/VJ-CAFE42; invalid input shows open-link-error; scan modal shows scanner-web-fallback with paste-instead hint. Passkey-setup ceremony completes and returns success state (Create your first request + Done buttons). MOBILE REGRESSION at 390x844: no horizontal overflow (scrollWidth==390 on /, /create, /pay/VJ-CAFE42, /share/VJ-Q8KWNP, /security, /activity), /create correctly HIDES the desktop-preview card (count=0), revoke-sheet slides from bottom on mobile (y=548 on 844-tall viewport). Zero console errors captured across all routes. No React Native red screens, no deprecated packages detected, no react-native issues to report.
critical_code_review_comments: app/index.tsx has multiple duplicate testIDs (home-activity-button appears on lines 138 and 172; home-security-button on 147/181; home-create-request-button on 166/452; home-open-link-button on 160/455). At runtime only one of each pair renders due to conditional layout (top-nav vs CTA row for desktop/mobile), so tests still return count=1 today, but duplicate testIDs are a maintenance hazard: any future refactor rendering both simultaneously would silently break assertions. Consider disambiguating (e.g., home-nav-activity vs home-cta-activity).

app/pay/[id].tsx wrong-wallet/wrong-network cards are gated by phase==='ready', but the checking->ready transition takes ~2-3s after wallet connect (verification steps). Callers/screenshots taken too soon can miss the card. Not a functional bug, but consider tightening or adding a testID hook when 'ready' fires to make automation deterministic.
seed_data_creation: None - all state is client-side (mock/localStorage). Newly created request during test got id VJ-5D88AW in one browser context (deterministic per session).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Each mcp_browser_automation session starts with no passkey and no wallet. For any test that reaches step 3 lock or the /pay Connect->pay flow, allow ~3.5s after clicking wallet-option-demo before checking downstream cards (wrong-wallet/wrong-network/pay-button visibility) - the verification phase transitions checking->ready over ~2-3s. After lock ceremony, allow ~5s before asserting create-vajra-code / create-share-request. Sheets are dialogs on desktop (centered at viewport center x) and bottom sheets on mobile (y ~= viewport_height - ~300). Desktop breakpoint kicks in at width>=1024 (see /app/frontend/src/hooks/use-breakpoint.ts). Wallet approve is [data-testid=wallet-approve-button], receipt view button is [data-testid=progress-view-receipt].
